rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use `assume` and `guarantee` keywords with labeled expressions in annex agree blocks.
generic_rules: Component type contracts should relate visible inputs to visible outputs without using implementation-only subcomponent paths.
AGREE annex blocks must be syntactically valid and use only visible identifiers from the model scope.
Constants and equations in AGREE should match the actual types of the referenced expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equation declarations and `const name : type = value;` for constants.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Deadline or Period as AGREE variables.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent ports in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
